name: LegalForensics
description: Know where you're exposed before you sign. Decision-first contract review for business teams — no legal expertise required. Works on any business contract — NDAs, MSAs, SOWs, lease, employment, consulting, contractor, service, distribution, franchise, and partnership agreements. Specialized depth for tech and healthcare agreements. Get risk-ranked clause analysis, structural imbalances, specific renegotiation asks, and a clear verdict: sign, negotiate, or walk away. Built for procurement and business teams, not lawyers. Learn more at legalforensics.ai
author: LegalForensics.AI

auth.instructions: Sign up at app.legalforensics.ai/plugin — your API key will be shown immediately after signup. Paste it here to connect.

tools.name: list_contracts
tools.description: List all contracts in your LF account, optionally filtered by keyword.

tools.name: get_analysis_report
tools.description: Full AI risk analysis: risk posture, top risks, exposure bands, next steps.

tools.name: get_decision_guidance
tools.description: Decision brief: sign, negotiate, or walk away — with reasoning.

tools.name: get_narrative_walkthrough
tools.description: Plain-English narrative explaining what the contract does and where the risk lies.

tools.name: run_standards_review
tools.description: Check contract against your company playbook standards.

tools.name: set_perspective
tools.description: Re-analyze from a specific perspective (buyer, seller, vendor, etc.).

tools.name: get_clause_details
tools.description: Deep dive on a single clause: risk factors, explanation, AI rewrite.

tools.name: explain_clause
tools.description: Explain pasted clause text in plain English without uploading a contract.

tools.name: upload_contract
tools.description: Upload a contract via URL or pasted text and get back a contract_id for analysis.
